hero.sub: Professional-grade formulas for effortless, all-day style.
section.about.body: Textura was created for people who care about their hair but don't want to think about it too much. No gimmicks. No filler ingredients. Just clean, effective formulas that work every single time.
section.newsletter.sub: New drops, exclusive offers and grooming tips.
product.sea-salt-spray.name: Sea Salt Spray
product.sea-salt-spray.desc: Natural beach texture with effortless matte volume. Lightweight, buildable hold.
product.matte-pomade.name: Matte Pomade
product.matte-pomade.desc: Firm hold with a natural matte finish. Water-based, easy wash out.
product.styling-clay.name: Styling Clay
product.styling-clay.desc: Zero shine, maximum structure. Reworkable all-day hold for any hair length.
product.texture-powder.name: Texture Powder
product.texture-powder.desc: Lightweight volume and matte texture. Invisible root lift for any style.
product.hair-oil.name: Nourishing Hair Oil
product.hair-oil.desc: Pure argan and jojoba blend. Adds shine, controls frizz, nourishes deeply.
product.starter-bundle.name: The Starter Bundle
product.starter-bundle.desc: Our three bestselling formulas in one curated kit. The perfect introduction.
review.1.text: The Sea Salt Spray is perfect. Natural texture without the crunch. I use it every day.
review.2.text: Matte Pomade gives me that salon finish at home. Strong hold, zero shine.
review.3.text: Styling Clay holds all day. First time a product actually delivers what it promises.
faq.1.q: How do I place an order?
faq.1.a: Add products to your cart, open the cart drawer, and click 'Order via Telegram'. Your order summary will be copied to your clipboard. Our team will assist you personally.
faq.2.a: Yes. We ship worldwide. Contact us on Telegram for specific shipping rates and estimated timelines to your country.
faq.3.a: We offer a 30-day satisfaction guarantee. If you're not happy, message us on Telegram and we will make it right — no questions asked.
faq.4.a: Most products last 2–3 months with daily use. Our formulas are concentrated — a little goes a long way.
